---
title: "Support Us"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Support EpiPulse

Your support helps us advance evidence-based public health initiatives in India and beyond. We are committed to transparency and accountability in all our operations.

## Current Status

EpiPulse is in an early setup phase. Public programs, audited impact numbers, and live donation channels are being prepared and will be published only after formal activation.

## Donation and Payment Status

:::{.payment-box}
### Donations Are Not Live Yet

Official bank/UPI/QR payment details are intentionally not published until activation and compliance checks are complete.

When ready, this section will include:

- Account Name
- Bank Name
- Account Number
- IFSC/SWIFT
- UPI ID
- Official QR
- Donation confirmation contact
:::

## Ways to Support

### 1. Volunteer Your Expertise
Join our community of public health professionals. Visit our [Volunteer](volunteer.qmd) page to learn about opportunities.

### 2. Partnership Opportunities
Organizations interested in collaboration can reach out through our [Contact](contact.qmd) page.

### 3. Stay Connected
Follow our work and join our [Community](community.qmd) for updates and discussions.

## Transparency and Accountability

We maintain full transparency in our operations. Visit our [Transparency](transparency.qmd) page to learn about our governance, legal structure, and future reporting plans.
